channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Olympian David Hearn indicted for alleged vandalism of Reflecting Pool
item.description: Olympian David Hearn has been indicted for allegedly maliciously destroying the lining at the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.

item.title: Celebrity planners discuss how MSG could become Taylor Swift's ideal wedding venue
item.description: Two elite event designers shared their thoughts on how Taylor Swift's team might transform Madison Square Garden.

item.title: Harvard astronomer leading White House UFO panel explains what he hopes to discover
item.description: The White House appointed former Harvard astronomer Avi Loeb to lead its new panel on Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena, also known as UAPs.

item.title: Parents charged in death of morbidly obese son to undergo competency evaluation
item.description: Casper O'Brien, 7, weighed 255 pounds at his death, which was caused by dilated cardiomyopathy with contributing conditions.
